text:
A Literal Vending Machine vs Demon Whale | Reborn as a Vending Machine
Episode 3: Boxxo fights another demon finger! Watch Reborn as a Vending Machine I Now Wander the Dungeon on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-raavm

The future of this fantasy world now lies in the hands of…a vending machine! Boxxo was once a human, until he died in an accident and was reincarnated as a sentient piece of machinery. While he can still hear and see, there's no way for him to move by himself or speak more than his programmed phrases. How can he make the most of this strange new life?

text:
Rudo Crashes Out | Gachiakuta
Episode 6: Rudo's having a breakdown... Watch Gachiakuta on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-gachiakuta

ABOUT GACHIAKUTA
In a floating city where the rich discard their waste—and people—Rudo is framed for murder and thrown into the Pit, where a hellscape of mutated garbage beasts dwell. To survive, he must wield a new power and join the rogue Cleaners. Rudo doesn’t just aim to battle monsters, but the corrupt who cast him into Hell.

ALL the teachers want him | Watch Wistoria: Wand and Sword
Watch Wistoria: Wand and Sword on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-wwas

ABOUT WISTORIA: WAND AND SWORD
In a world where magic reigns, Will Serfort can’t cast a spell. Though hardworking, Will’s classmates think less of him for it. However, he has a secret strength: his sword. Can Will defy expectations with muscle over magic and blade over wand? Find out in this epic sword-and-sorcery adventure!

author: Crunchyroll
text:
Julius Gets the Subaru Treatment | Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4
Episode 6: That's rough buddy... Watch Re:ZERO on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-rezero4

ABOUT RE:ZERO
Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world. As he's lost and confused in a new world where he doesn't even know left from right, the only person to reach out to him was a beautiful girl with silver hair. Determined to repay her somehow for saving him from his own despair, Subaru agrees to help the girl find something she's looking for...
